description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. This fragrance captures a youthful spirit and the innocence of the heart. Product Details Rasasi Innocence is a perfume spray for women with a floral, fruity and sweet fragrance. Top notes are green, gardenia, citrus and bergamot. The middle notes are carnation, rose and jasmine. The base notes are peach, apricot, vanilla, woody and sandal. The perfume comes in stylish flask with a pink shoulder which has a metallic sheen and a pink cap fashioned after a hat with a metallic pink ring at the base of the cap. Size 65 ml
